teaser.foraging_idea: Today (Hidden Cache Reveal): Revisit an old project, notebook, or commit; one buried insight may be ripe now.

teaser.journal_prompt: What old structure is ready to come down so something sturdier can grow? Reflect on Burrow Rebuild during Year 1, Chattering Moon, Timber-day.
teaser.foraging_idea: Today (Burrow Rebuild): Retire one brittle habit or tool; sketch the replacement before rebuilding.

teaser.journal_prompt: What wisdom is settling in your burrow right now? Reflect on Burrowstill Knowing during Year 1, Chattering Moon, Swindle-day.
teaser.foraging_idea: Today (Burrowstill Knowing): Strategic rest, integration, listening inward.

teaser.journal_prompt: What idea, story, or resource are you ready to scatter today? Reflect on Chatterseed Scatter during Year 1, Chattering Moon, Willow-day.
teaser.foraging_idea: Today (Chatterseed Scatter): Generosity without attachment, outward connection, joyful release.

teaser.journal_prompt: Looking across the full year’s circuit, what wisdom are you bringing home? (Year 1, Chattering Moon, Nap-day — The Messenger’s Circuit Complete)
teaser.foraging_idea: Today (The Messenger’s Circuit Complete): Synthesis, sharing the full harvest, preparing the next cycle.
